banner.description1: We build scalable digital solutions across web, mobile, and cloud.
banner.description2: We help businesses solve real challenges through smart, reliable technology.
vision.slidingHeader.title: Our
vision.title: Our
vision.description1: To drive innovation through intelligent digital solutions that solve real-world business challenges. We envision a future where technology enables efficiency, growth, and meaningful progress.
vision.description2: We are committed to continuous learning, adaptability, and thoughtful execution, ensuring our solutions stay relevant in an ever-evolving digital landscape.
vision.description3: We believe that strong technology is built with responsibility. Our vision is to simplify complexity, embrace innovation, and create digital solutions that support sustainable growth and long-term success for our clients.
journey.title: Our
journey.description: Helping brands succeed through smart and dependable technology.

journey.List.description: The company was incorporated in the UK as a technology consulting firm for enterprise digital transformation, working with global organizations like Infosys, IBM, HCL, Booking.com, DXC, Capgemini, and Accenture to build expertise in large-scale enterprise systems.

Expanded operations to India, delivering consulting and product engineering for organizations like Aspire Systems, Qbrainx, and UST Global while developing custom web and mobile applications and building foundations for future platform products.

Strengthened our engineering capabilities and accelerated research and development initiatives in India. This phase focused on building next-generation digital architectures, automation frameworks, and AI-driven technology capabilities.

Focused on product innovation, strategic client growth, and designing scalable SaaS-ready architectures. This laid the groundwork for building multi-platform digital solutions across different industry verticals.

Transitioned into a product-focused organization with the launch of our brand WON Apps. This marked the beginning of the WON Ecosystem — a unified digital universe of platforms designed to power businesses across multiple industries.

Launched our first intelligent platform and expanded the WON Platform Ecosystem. Additional platforms were introduced to address evolving digital transformation and operational needs of modern organizations.

Continuing to expand the WON Ecosystem as a network of autonomous and intelligent platforms powered by artificial intelligence. Our vision is to build a digital universe of interconnected platforms that learn, automate, and evolve with businesses across industries.

aboutUs.description: We hold patents on next-generation smart footwear platform that transforms everyday movement into meaningful health insights. By combining advanced sensing technology with intelligent data analytics, the system enables real-time monitoring and personalized wellness feedback.Energy-efficient and seamlessly connected, this innovation sits at the intersection of healthcare, mobility, and wearable technology — shaping the future of preventive, data-driven care.

brands.title: That Trust Us
brands.description: Helping brands succeed through smart and dependable technology.
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Projects that reflect our expertise and commitment to quality

projects.List.title: WON Bill
projects.List.description: WON Bills is an enterprise billing automation platform. It simplifies invoicing and payments. Designed for scalability and accuracy.

projects.List.title: WON Digi
projects.List.description: WON Digi is a comprehensive school and institute management platform. It digitizes academic, administrative, and operational workflows.

projects.List.title: WON Pulse
projects.List.description: WON Pulse is a complete hospital and healthcare management system. It streamlines clinical, administrative, and operational processes.

projects.List.title: WON Hubs
projects.List.description: WON Hubs is an Autonomous Cloud-Based Centralized Workflow Automation Platform that seamlessly connects omnichannel and enterprise systems, enabling organizations to design, automate, and orchestrate operational workflows from a single unified hub.

projects.List.title: WON Bridge
projects.List.description: WON Bridge is a mining management platform that simplifies weighment operations and material tracking with role-based access, centralized dashboards, alerts, and real-time stock monitoring.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Real feedback from clients who've partnered with us to build reliable digital solutions.

testimonials.list.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.list.text: NowIT delivered exactly what we needed, on time and with strong attention to quality. The team was responsive, professional, and easy to work with throughout the project.

testimonials.list.name: Ananya Sharma
testimonials.list.text: They quickly understood our vision and turned it into a scalable product. The process was smooth, and the final outcome exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.list.name: Vikram Rao
testimonials.list.text: Their technical expertise and structured approach helped us build a reliable solution across web and mobile. We value them as a long-term partner.

becomepartner.description: Partner with NowIT Services to collaborate, innovate, and deliver customized solutions.
Aboutus.text: We hold patents on next-generation smart footwear platform that transforms everyday movement into meaningful health insights. By combining advanced sensing technology with intelligent data analytics, the system enables real-time monitoring and personalized wellness feedback. Energy-efficient and seamlessly connected, this innovation sits at the intersection of healthcare, mobility, and wearable technology shaping the future of preventive, data-driven care.
